calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: All parties were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

This matter was called with case number PED-12-295790 (Jang Hi Kim vs. Jung Ki Lee).

Appearances: Jang Hi Kim (Petitioner in Pro Per). Jin Shim for and with Kun Suk Chu and Jung Ki Lee (Respondents). Jang H. Cho (Witness for the Petitioner). Carol Yun (Korean Interpreter for the Petitioner and his witnesses. Kwang C. Lee (Witness for the Petitioner). Dong Sue Kim (Witness for the Petitioner).

Mr. Shim stated that the Respondent's name is Kun Suk Chu, not Chu Kun Suk and that he has no objection to Mrs. Yun serving as interpreter.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's request is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Jang Hi Kim and his home. Stay Away Order from the Senior Center is not granted but the Respondents are required to stay at least two yards away from the Petitioner at the Senior Center.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Attack, Strike, Stalk, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Harass, Destroy The Personal Property Of, Or Disturb The Peace Of The Person.

No Guns or Other Firearms.

Expires: July 18, 2015.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR#5976. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.
